18 
CCW_LD_DT 
LABEL: 
CCW Load Date 
DESCRIPTION: The Date Source File was Loaded to the CCW

LONG NAME: CCW_LD_DT 
TYPE: 
DATE

8 
FILE(S): 
Annual DE base 
SOURCE: 
CCW (derived) 
VALUES: 
Date (numeric, system dependent) 
COMMENT: 
States may resubmit T-MSIS claims data to CMS. This date indicates when the claims were obtained by
